text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen, and Tokai
Teio—the racer Sweep Tosho's peer looks up
to—is running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a Grand Prix race that serves as a fitting stage
to determine the greatest runner of the year. Can
Sweep Tosho cast her magic again?
